{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321123022D898CC1B44CDE53073A1"}"},"total":842},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7588436172642468632","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的挺好看，人设实在是太完美了，没有重生没有系统那些乱七八糟的，说实话系统之类的设定都是作者给自己开的后台，推进剧情，化解不合理的逻辑和情节一个系统就可以搞定。但这本书没有，完完全全在原著的基础上加了一个角色，但是完全没有不合理的感觉，作者融入的非常好，相当出色的文笔，原著的其他人物也基本都人设在线，而且这本书是强主线弱推理，柯南同人文就应该这样。我是铁血纯爱党，所以一般同人文同一个角色的CP我只看一本，很幸运我看到了这本，小哀就应该有这样一个坚定爱着她尊重她的人，林这个角色真的是小哀的救赎，也是作者对小哀爱。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766824507,"group_id":"7338858450916477977","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"变百不是百!知道内核是男的根本就渲染不出两个美女!","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3c4kU34pERNADyN4sOsZW9F9iky4op+t1mfbqVDzJPX","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/752559b577424b5b869c8779fd278375~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616714&x-signature=9OirnM4pDR8NwA09toC0cM1D7YA%3D","user_id":"2265442272152158","user_name":"星暖源舟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2265442272152158","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7338858450916477977","book_info":{"abstract":"【衍生同人+双女主+原创人物+无男主】
原创角色x灰原哀，人设不ooc，互相救赎，双向暗恋，极尽暧昧拉扯。非剧情流，主要写主角二人的感情。走tv剧情与剧场版穿插进行，以tv为基准。时间线会有部分混乱，部分原创剧情+长大剧情。
所有设定为剧情服务，考究党勿入。
注：主角私设，代号不为酒，而是步枪Famas。介意勿入。
——不管一千遍还是一万遍，我都会找到你。
黑衣组织杀手相叶悠，代号“Famas”
世界屈指可数的天才杀手，被称为组织中的人型武器“银色弯刀”的银发少女。
却被安排给组织中的少女科学家作为保镖。
相叶悠一心觉得自己大材小用。
却在无数个日夜，朝夕相处中，渐渐迷上了这个冷漠寡言的少女。
在某一天，相叶悠发现了她一直以来调查的秘密。
直到宫野志保消失在那如同密室般的毒气室后，少女决定，不惜一切代价，也要追上那一抹来之不易的“月光”
小一生林间鹤，由此诞生。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6012f99359cf7713662bd89c09e0d9d0","author":"横竖都是一","author_id":"","book_id":"7338858450916477977","book_name":"柯南：灰原小姐的青梅挚友","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0d8e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5997人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":704,"name":"双女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=704&name=双女主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7339051150827602457","read_count":"5997","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1235967"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"583","tags":"双女主,二次元,同人,1v1,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f2690675c84b16c1ecc361adf995073e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779251422&x-signature=pEy3KwW%2BKG3%2FFHc0OEbMtEQIigQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2951542290001710","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"553"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321123022D898CC1B44CDE53073A1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读25小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":90278,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":463},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7504689821815931672","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太好看了，真的很喜欢小哀和间鹤，曾经也幻想过自己有一天穿越到名柯里去保护小哀，不让她难过不让她被别人恶心，间鹤真的是我看了这么多小说里最符合要求的，心思细腻而且只在乎小哀，最重要的是她好多决定会选择和小哀一起商量而不是打着为你好的幌子瞒着对方，在间鹤眼里才能看出我们志保最原始的样子，她会在听到组织的时候吓到发抖，但是比眼泪更先出来的是勇气，她一直都是一个勇敢的宝宝，只不过原著里没有人愿意相信她一直觉得她是弱者，什么事情都要瞒着她，希望每一个平行世界的小哀都可以遇到属于自己的间鹤，志保和悠一定要永远开心[送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747325540,"group_id":"7338858450916477977","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我好帅","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8snvkA3/jH752H3vV6WPq4=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/66d698be42fa45bd8e0af763159bb5c4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776622544&x-signature=rIbiHCDJtxwQM1AuGK3CHm2UKF0%3D","user_id":"108827076916","user_name":"晴明"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"108827076916","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1707666401,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E8EEFF","can_worn":false,"id":9,"name":"守护者","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9bfd769bf7c1205b6bb2f351783fe88c","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/05d4b00798f1b51b8642604fba4b0ac9"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7338858450916477977","book_info":{"abstract":"【衍生同人+双女主+原创人物+无男主】

tick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7473874731448976190","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很优秀的文，灰原和主角很甜，感情戏精彩，对主线和剧场版的“重构”感觉很不错，关于主角对待一些角色的态度和我的对待一些角色的态度相似度超高！！（比如不喜（可以说厌恶）赤井秀一，不喜柯南等）
至于作者说的“弱化、不够精彩、仓促、草率”我觉得没有，对于【终章】的构思很不错，自我感觉是很优秀的结局
还有好多话想说，但是话到嘴边又不知从何开口，最后只憋出了这短短的平淡的书评，最后甚至只有一句“很不错”来评价……www
